message:
fix(tui): replace cryptic facet symbols and abbreviations with explicit labels (br-1xt0m.1.10.2)

Replace Unicode symbols (◎, ◧, ⚡, ✓, ⇵, ◳) and abbreviations ("Imp.",
"Ack", "Field", "Both") with self-descriptive labels: "Importance",
"Ack Required", "Search Field", "Subject+Body", etc.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
